core_mechanism: a weak-turbulence energy cascade in which weakly-nonlinear waves transfer a conserved quantity across scales through resonant multi-wave interactions (here six-wave resonances), yielding a scale-invariant power-law amplitude spectrum
brief_reason: The abstract reports wave-amplitude spectra consistent with a weak-turbulence cascade and identifies six-wave resonant interactions as the mechanism driving the scale-to-scale energy transfer.
